-- 1 of 4 --

Warming Your Cold List
▪ 	Almost EVERYONE has let a list go cold (by not
publishing to it)
▪ 	For every week or month a list goes unmailed, it gets
colder
▪ 	Fortunately, there is an easy solution
Module One - Warming Your Cold List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

How to Warm Your Cold List
▪ 	The mea culpa… reintroduce yourself and tell them why
you haven’t contacted them
▪ 	It doesn’t have to be a great reason
▪ 	Some “revelation of self” might not be a bad thing…
▪ 	Send them two or three pieces of cool content
▪ 	Possibly ask them to opt-in for some cool bonus content
Module One - Warming Your Cold List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

How to Warm Your Cold List
▪ 	Have them opt-in to a new list
▪ 	Your new list and old list are different lists, treat them
differently
▪ 	Periodically mail your old list and try to get more
people to move over to your new list
▪ 	That’s it… it’s that simple
Module One - Warming Your Cold List
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 4 --
